authors.author: Frances Ridley Havergal
Louie Giglio
Nimm mein Leben, es zu halten

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Create in me A heart that is clean 'Cause I want to be Who You want me to be The depths of my soul Are Yours Lord to mould 'Cause I want to be Who You want me to be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Spirit fill me, overwhelm me Holy Spirit use me, for Your glory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Here's my life Let it be a living sacrifice All that I am Surrender into Your hands I surrender

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: No matter where No matter when Lord, I will go Where You want me to go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here's my life Let it be a living sacrifice All that I am Surrender it to Your hands I surrender Here I am Jesus, let Your will be done in me All that I am Surrender it to Your hands I surrender

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I give it all, my heart and soul Jesus, I'm living for You You have it all, my heart and soul Jesus, I'm living for You I give it all, my heart and soul Jesus, I'm living for You You have it all, my heart and soul Jesus, I'm living for You
